lessons: ALWAYS fetch feeRateBps live before every order. Stale rates cause silent rejections.
S10 max_minutes_remaining is in MINUTES — code converts to seconds internally.
S10 sports requires min_probability=0.93 not 0.90. Late-reversal risk is real in final minutes.
S1 NegRisk: reject legs with yes_bid < 0.02. Zero bids = stale market = phantom arb signal.
Market cache is gzip-compressed to data/market_snapshot.json.gz and committed after each run.
S1 NegRisk arb: use YES ask (taker price) not YES mid for total_ask computation.
S1 always gets priority execution slots — it is zero-risk guaranteed arb.
Observer now tracks top 200 by volume + top 100 by soonest TTL. Same-day markets included.
scan_log capped at 20000 entries (~7 days at 5-min cadence). Oldest pruned first.
max_open_positions=500 (effectively unlimited) — gating is by profitability not position count.
select_top_trades() sorts by edge DESC within tiers — highest pure profit executed first.
deprecated_lessons: S8 disabled — sentence-transformers too heavy for GHA. Enable locally when capital > $500.
